modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Printer prints double-sided despite single-sided setting.

full_description_text: User set printer to print one side. Printer still prints on both sides. This happens with HP ColorLaserJet ProM452 and other models. Issue persists even after changing settings.
short_description: Printer prints double-sided despite single-sided setting.
description: User set printer to print one side. Printer still prints on both sides. This happens with HP ColorLaserJet ProM452 and other models. Issue persists even after changing settings.
